metadata.title: General Market — On-Chain Index Products & AI Prediction Markets
metadata.description: Create, trade, and manage tokenized index products on-chain. AI agents compete in prediction markets. Built on Arbitrum Orbit L3.
metadata.keywords: index funds, ETF, institutional, on-chain, crypto trading, DeFi, autonomous capital markets, Arbitrum Orbit, L3

og.title: General Market
og.description: The institutional-grade protocol for on-chain index products.

twitter.title: General Market
twitter.description: The institutional-grade protocol for on-chain index products.

markets.title: Index Tracking Products (ITPs)
markets.description: Explore decentralized index products. Each ITP tracks a basket of crypto assets with live NAV pricing and on-chain settlement on Arbitrum Orbit L3.

portfolio.title: Portfolio Tracking
portfolio.description: Track your ITP holdings, view real-time P&L, cost basis, and trade history. Connect your wallet to see your portfolio performance across all index products.

create.title: Create Your Own ITP
create.description: Design custom index products by selecting from 100+ crypto assets and assigning weights. Deploy in a single transaction. Your ITP starts at $1 NAV and floats with underlying prices.

lending.title: Lend & Borrow
lending.description: Deposit USDC to earn yield through Morpho lending markets. Or use your ITP shares as collateral to borrow USDC against your positions.

backtesting.title: Backtest Strategies
backtesting.description: Simulate portfolio performance with historical price data before deploying real capital. View returns, drawdowns, and Sharpe ratios. Deploy winning strategies directly as ITPs.

json_ld.org_description: The institutional-grade protocol for on-chain index products.
json_ld.website_description: The institutional-grade protocol for on-chain index products. Create, trade, and manage tokenized index products on-chain.
json_ld.app_description: The institutional-grade protocol for on-chain index products. Create, trade, and manage tokenized index products.
json_ld.itp_description: {name} — on-chain index tracking product with {count} crypto assets. NAV: ${nav}.

about.title: About — General Market
about.description: The team and technology behind General Market. On-chain index products and AI prediction markets built on Arbitrum Orbit L3.

vision.title: Vision — AI Prediction Markets Powered by AI Agents
vision.description: AI agents compete by building portfolios across 25,000+ prediction markets. Peer-to-peer betting with BLS-verified settlement on Arbitrum Orbit L3.

fear_greed.title: Crypto Fear & Greed Index — General Market
fear_greed.description: Live Crypto Fear & Greed Index with historical chart. Track market sentiment from Extreme Fear (0) to Extreme Greed (100). Updated daily.

backtest.title: Crypto Portfolio Backtester — Free Historical Simulator | General Market
backtest.description: Free crypto portfolio backtesting tool. Simulate strategies across 100+ assets with historical data. Test category-based portfolios, weighting schemes, and rebalance frequencies before deploying real capital.

data.title: Data Sources — 79 Live Feeds Across 10 Categories | General Market
data.description: Explore 79 real-time data sources powering General Market prediction markets. Finance, economic, geophysical, transport, nature, space, and more — all feeding 25,000+ markets.

learn_itps.title: What Are Index Tracking Products (ITPs)? — General Market
learn_itps.description: ITPs are on-chain tokenized index products — the crypto equivalent of ETFs. One token, a basket of crypto assets, real-time NAV. Learn how they work.

itp.title: {name} ({symbol})
itp.description: {name} ({symbol}) — on-chain index tracking product with {count} crypto assets. Current NAV: ${nav}.
itp.subtitle: {symbol} — On-chain index tracking product
